title: Applicability of Code of Civil Procedure
doc_html:
§2561.10.  Applicability of Code of Civil Procedure

The provisions of the Louisiana Code of Civil Procedure with reference to city courts, shall be applicable to this court in all civil cases.

Acts 1962, No. 484, §10.
